title: Savory Spicy Filipino Corn Bicol Express
description: A sour, flaky, and festive Filipino dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese and bhuna, this recipe is jain-friendly and serves as a unique twist on traditional Bicol Express.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add the lemon juice to the bowl and stir until the mixture forms a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable and smooth.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a tablespoon of mozzarella cheese in the center of each disk.
Fold the disk in half to enclose the cheese and press the edges together to seal.
Fry the arepas in the hot oil for 3-4 minutes on each side until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the arepas on paper towels and serve with bhuna sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
